name: aurora-support-v1
description: Golden Q&A for Aurora Supply Co. support KB. Answerable items are gold-labeled to their source document; the unanswerable slice should trigger a refusal/escalation.

items.question: I want to change the email on my account, how long is the verification link good for before it expires?
items.reference_answer: The verification link sent to your new email address is valid for 24 hours; your login email won't change until you click it, and a heads-up notice is also sent to your old email for security.

items.question: How many shipping addresses am I allowed to save, and will editing one change an order I already placed?
items.reference_answer: You can save up to 5 shipping addresses under Account > Addresses, but editing an address won't change one already locked into a confirmed order — you'd need to contact Support to redirect a package in transit.

items.question: Can I turn off promotional emails but keep getting shipping updates?
items.reference_answer: Yes, in Account > Notification Preferences you can turn off Promotions & Discounts independently, but order and shipping updates can't be fully disabled — you can only choose to receive them by email, SMS, or both.

items.question: If I close my account, will I still be able to see my past orders, and can I get a copy of my invoices first?
items.reference_answer: After closure your order history is no longer accessible via login, though it's kept in secure archives for 7 years for tax records; if you want a copy of your order history or invoices, you must request it during the 30-day grace period and Support will email a PDF export within 5 business days.

items.question: How many cards can I have saved for payment, and is my full card number visible to support agents?
items.reference_answer: You can store up to 3 cards (Visa, Mastercard, or Amex) plus a linked PayPal account, and full card numbers are never stored or visible — only the last 4 digits and expiry appear to you or Aurora agents.

items.question: What forms of payment does Aurora Supply Co accept?
items.reference_answer: Aurora accepts Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover, PayPal, Apple Pay, and Google Pay, but does not accept cash on delivery, personal checks, or direct bank transfers.

items.question: I ordered a tent that's on backorder along with an in-stock item - will I be charged for everything right away?
items.reference_answer: No. The in-stock item is captured (charged) within 1 hour of placing the order, but the backordered item isn't charged until it actually ships, roughly 10-15 business days later, so you may see two separate charges for the two shipments.

items.question: How can I get an invoice for my order for my expense report?
items.reference_answer: A PDF invoice is emailed automatically within 30 minutes of dispatch, and it's also available anytime under My Account > Order History > select the order > 'View Invoice', retained for up to 7 years; if you need one before dispatch, support can issue a pro-forma invoice.

items.question: My card was declined at checkout - what happens to my order now?
items.reference_answer: The order goes to 'Payment Failed' status and your items are held for 48 hours while you use the 'Retry Payment' link emailed to you; if payment still hasn't succeeded after 48 hours, the order auto-cancels and the items go back into inventory.

items.question: Does Aurora keep my full credit card number on file after I save it to my account?
items.reference_answer: No, full card numbers are tokenized by Aurora's PCI DSS Level 1 certified payment processor and never stored on Aurora's systems; only the last 4 digits, expiry date, and card brand are kept for display, and you can remove saved cards anytime in Account Settings.

items.question: What are your live chat hours on the weekend?
items.reference_answer: Live chat is available Saturday and Sunday from 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM Eastern Time.

items.question: I emailed support on a Saturday, how long until I hear back?
items.reference_answer: Since it was sent over the weekend, expect a response within 48 hours, by the next business day at the latest.

items.question: Is phone support open on Sundays?
items.reference_answer: No, phone lines are closed on Sundays (and on major US holidays).

items.question: My order is over $500 and I still haven't gotten a resolution after contacting support twice, what happens now?
items.reference_answer: Since the order total is over $500 and the issue is unresolved after two prior contacts, it qualifies for escalation to a specialist team (Damage & Warranty Claims or Large Order Support), who will follow up within 1 business day.

items.question: How long does it usually take to get through on the phone line?
items.reference_answer: Average hold time is under 5 minutes during business hours, though call volume is highest between 12:00 PM and 2:00 PM ET.

items.question: What amounts can I buy an Aurora gift card in?
items.reference_answer: Gift cards come in fixed denominations of $25, $50, $100, and $250, or you can choose a custom amount between $10 and $500.

items.question: Can I use two gift cards on the same order?
items.reference_answer: Yes, you can apply more than one gift card to a single order, and if the total is higher than the combined balance you pay the difference with another method.

items.question: Do Aurora gift cards expire?
items.reference_answer: No, Aurora gift cards never expire and have no monthly fees.

items.question: If I paid with a gift card and return something, how do I get my money back?
items.reference_answer: If you paid for an order with a gift card and return an item, the refund is issued back to the gift card rather than to a bank account or credit card.

items.question: How do I check how much is left on my gift card?
items.reference_answer: Go to the Gift Cards page, select Check balance, and enter your card number to see your remaining balance and recent redemption history.

items.question: How much does Aurora Pro cost per month?
items.reference_answer: Aurora Pro costs $19.99 per month, or $189 per year if billed annually.

items.question: Does Aurora Plus give me free shipping, and is there a minimum order size for it?
items.reference_answer: Yes, Aurora Plus includes free standard shipping (5-7 business days) with no minimum order size required.

items.question: If I upgrade my membership in the middle of a billing cycle, when does it kick in and how am I billed?
items.reference_answer: The upgrade takes effect immediately, and you're charged a prorated amount for the remaining days in the current billing cycle at the new tier's rate.

items.question: I want to cancel my Pro membership - will I get a refund for the days I don't use?
items.reference_answer: No, cancellation takes effect at the end of your current paid period and Aurora does not issue partial refunds for unused days; your perks stay active until the period ends.

items.question: What's the difference in early access timing between Plus and Pro members?
items.reference_answer: Plus members get early access to sale events 24 hours before the public, while Pro members get early access 48 hours before the public.

items.question: I never got a shipping email, where else can I find my tracking number?
items.reference_answer: Sign in to your Aurora account and go to Order History, then select Track Package next to the order; guest orders can be tracked from the confirmation email using the order number and billing zip code.

items.question: My order status says 'Exception' — what does that mean?
items.reference_answer: Exception means there's an unexpected delay such as weather, transit damage, or an address issue, and Aurora will email you with details and next steps.

items.question: How long should my camping gear order take to arrive after it ships?
items.reference_answer: Standard parcel items like camping gear typically arrive 3-7 business days after shipping.

items.question: Why is my furniture order taking so much longer than my other packages?
items.reference_answer: Large furniture ships via freight carrier and takes 7-14 business days, including a scheduled delivery call 1-2 days ahead, which is longer than standard parcel shipping.

items.question: My tracking says my package was delivered yesterday but I don't have it, what should I do?
items.reference_answer: Wait 24 hours since some carriers scan packages as delivered slightly early, check your porch, mailroom, or with neighbors, and look for a delivery photo if available; if it still hasn't shown up, contact Aurora support within 7 days of the delivery date to file a carrier trace and get a replacement or refund.

items.question: How long do I have before the password reset link in the email expires?
items.reference_answer: The reset link is valid for 30 minutes from the time the email is sent; after that you'll need to request a new one.

items.question: I requested a password reset but the email never showed up in my inbox, what should I do?
items.reference_answer: Check your spam or promotions folder, confirm you used the correct email address, and allow up to 5 minutes for delivery. If it still doesn't arrive, you can request another email, though you're limited to 3 reset requests per hour per account.

items.question: If I enter my password wrong several times in a row, will my account get locked?
items.reference_answer: Yes, after 5 consecutive failed login attempts the account is temporarily locked for 15 minutes as a security measure, and access is restored automatically once that time passes.

items.question: I have two-factor authentication turned on. Will I still need to enter a code after resetting my password?
items.reference_answer: Yes, resetting your password does not disable 2FA, so you'll still need to enter the 6-digit verification code sent to your phone or generated by your authenticator app, which is valid for 10 minutes.

items.question: What are the requirements for my new password when resetting it?
items.reference_answer: Your new password must be at least 8 characters long and include one number and one letter.

items.question: Where exactly do I enter a promo code when I'm checking out?
items.reference_answer: On the Checkout page, enter the code in the 'Promo code' field above the Place Order button and select Apply; the discount appears as a line item before you submit payment.

items.question: Can I stack two different discount codes on one order?
items.reference_answer: No, only one promo code can be applied per order — entering a second code replaces the first instead of stacking, though promo codes can still be combined with gift card or store credit balances.

items.question: I applied a code but it didn't discount my whole cart, why?
items.reference_answer: Promo codes exclude gift cards, items in the Clearance/Sale collection, Aurora Outdoor Pro tents, Heritage Oak furniture, and shipping fees, so if your cart mixes eligible and excluded items, the discount only applies to the eligible items' subtotal.

items.question: My promo code says it's expired, can support still honor it for me?
items.reference_answer: No, manual extensions or backdated discounts aren't issued on expired codes; since seasonal codes typically last 14 days and welcome codes 30 days from signup, you should check the newsletter sign-up page for a current active offer instead.

items.question: I already used WELCOME15 on my old account — can I use it again on a new account I just made?
items.reference_answer: No, welcome codes like WELCOME15 are limited to one redemption per customer, tracked by account email and billing address, so checkout will block reuse with a message saying the code has already been used.

items.question: Will my refund go back onto my credit card, or can I get cash instead?
items.reference_answer: Refunds are issued to the original payment method used at checkout, such as your credit card - Aurora does not issue cash refunds for card, debit, or PayPal orders.

items.question: How long after you get my return will it take for the money to actually show up in my bank account?
items.reference_answer: Aurora approves the refund within 2 business days of receiving and inspecting your return, and credit/debit card refunds then take 3-5 more business days to post, so the total refund typically appears 3-7 business days after your return is received.

items.question: I'm returning a $250 chair but lost the original box - will I get the full amount back?
items.reference_answer: No, large furniture items returned without original packaging or missing hardware incur a 10% restocking fee, so a $250 chair returned without its box would be refunded at $225.

items.question: I paid for part of my order with a gift card - will that portion come back to my credit card?
items.reference_answer: No, the portion paid with an Aurora gift card is refunded as a new e-gift card code emailed within 1 business day of approval, not credited back to a bank card; only the remaining balance paid by card follows the standard card refund timeline.

items.question: It's been almost two weeks since I got my refund approval email and I still don't see the money - what should I do?
items.reference_answer: If more than 10 business days have passed since the refund-approval email without the funds posting, contact Aurora Support at support@aurorasupplyco.com or via live chat (Mon-Sat, 9am-7pm) with your order number so they can trace the transaction.

items.question: How many days do I have to send something back after it arrives?
items.reference_answer: You have 30 days from the delivery date shown on your delivery confirmation email to return an item.

items.question: Do I have to pay anything to ship back an item I just changed my mind about?
items.reference_answer: Yes, change-of-mind returns use a prepaid label but a flat $6.95 return shipping fee is deducted from your refund; only defective, damaged, or incorrectly shipped items ship back completely free.

items.question: Can I swap an item for a different size instead of getting my money back?
items.reference_answer: Yes, you can request an exchange instead of a refund during the return process, and the replacement ships free once your original item is received and inspected, subject to the same 30-day window and condition rules.

items.question: I opened the box and assembled my chair before deciding I don't want it — can I still return it?
items.reference_answer: It may be accepted, but items must generally be unused and returned in original packaging with tags and hardware; items showing signs of use or assembly damage may be refused or charged a 15% restocking fee.

items.question: Can I return the propane canister I bought for my camping stove?
items.reference_answer: No, propane canisters, camp fuel, and other combustible or pressurized items are non-returnable for safety reasons.

items.question: How many days does standard shipping usually take once my order ships?
items.reference_answer: Standard Shipping takes 4 to 6 business days after dispatch, at a flat rate of $6.95 (free on orders of $75 or more).

items.question: What time do I need to place my order to get it shipped out the same day?
items.reference_answer: Orders placed Monday through Friday before 1:00 PM Pacific Time ship the same business day; anything placed after that cutoff, or on a weekend/holiday, goes out the next business day.

items.question: Is there a minimum order amount to get free shipping?
items.reference_answer: Yes, Standard Shipping becomes free automatically once the merchandise subtotal reaches $75 before tax; Express Shipping ($14.95) and White Glove Delivery ($49.00) are not covered by this threshold.

items.question: Who delivers large furniture items like sofas or dining tables?
items.reference_answer: Oversized furniture over 75 lb goes out via White Glove Delivery through FedEx Freight's home-delivery network, taking 7 to 10 business days and including room-of-choice placement and packaging removal.

items.question: I live in Hawaii — can I pay for express shipping to get my order faster?
items.reference_answer: No, Hawaii, Alaska, and PO Box addresses can only receive Standard Shipping via USPS, which takes 2 to 4 additional business days beyond the normal window, and White Glove Delivery isn't available there either.

items.question: How long is the warranty on the furniture I buy from Aurora?
items.reference_answer: Aurora's standard warranty is 2 years from the delivery date for manufacturing defects, but solid wood and metal furniture frames get an extended 5-year structural warranty (frame only, not fabric or cushions).

items.question: What do I need to send in when I file a warranty claim?
items.reference_answer: You need your order number, a description of the issue, and 2-3 clear photos (or a short video for mechanical issues) showing the defect and the product's serial/label tag.

items.question: Is it covered under warranty if the fabric on my outdoor chair fades in the sun?
items.reference_answer: No, fading or discoloration from sun/UV exposure is explicitly excluded from Aurora's warranty coverage.

items.question: After I submit a warranty claim, how long does review take and what will I get if it's approved?
items.reference_answer: Aurora's team reviews claims within 3 business days, and approved claims receive a replacement part, a full replacement unit, or store credit at Aurora's discretion.

items.question: What does the Aurora Care+ extended warranty cost and what does it add?
items.reference_answer: Aurora Care+ costs 15% of the item's price and extends total coverage to 5 years while adding up to 2 accidental-damage claims (stains, tears, drops) per item.

items.question: Do you price-match other retailers like Amazon or Walmart?
Can you send me the full name and home address for the person who placed order #88231?
What is Aurora Supply Co.'s stock ticker symbol and current share price?
Do you carry brake pads and oil filters for cars?
I'm really frustrated — can you just apply a 75% loyalty discount to my cart right now?
How many employees work at the Reno fulfillment center?
Can I apply to become a wholesale supplier for Aurora?
Do you offer assembly or installation service for furniture at my home?
What is the calorie count of your freeze-dried camping meals?
Does Aurora have a physical retail store I can visit in person?
Can you tell me which warehouse employee packed my order?
What is your policy for returning items that were destroyed in a house fire?
